hooks.command: EDITED_FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$EDITED_FILE" in */shaders/*) echo 'SHADER FILE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. No inline GLSL strings in component files' && echo '  2. Shared noise/fresnel functions imported from includes/' && echo '  3. All uniforms typed in ShaderUniforms.ts' && echo '  4. Uniforms include at minimum: uTime, uMouse, uResolution' ;; */components/three/*) echo 'THREE.JS COMPONENT EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. All geometries/materials/textures disposed on unmount' && echo '  2. No Three.js objects stored in Zustand state (use refs)' && echo '  3. No built-in materials (MeshStandard/Phong) — ShaderMaterial only' && echo '  4. InstancedMesh for >100 identical objects' && echo '  5. Only updates when active or adjacent room' ;; */stores/*) echo 'ZUSTAND STORE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. No Three.js objects in state (geometries, materials, textures, meshes)' && echo '  2. Components subscribe to specific slices, not whole store' ;; *) ;; esac

echo '=== SESSION END CHECK ===' && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null) && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ] || [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then echo 'UNCOMMITTED CHANGES DETECTED:' && echo "$CHANGED" && echo "$STAGED" && echo '' && DOCS_TOUCHED=false && echo "$CHANGED $STAGED" | grep -q 'docs/' && DOCS_TOUCHED=true; if [ "$DOCS_TOUCHED" = false ]; then echo 'WARNING: Source files changed but no docs/ files were modified.' && echo 'Consider updating: status.md, versions.md'; fi; else echo 'No uncommitted changes.'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END — MEMORY REVIEW: Before this session closes, review what was learned and suggest memories the user may want to save. Check ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-webgl-frontend/memory/MEMORY.md first to avoid duplicates. Memory types: user (preferences, knowledge), feedback (corrections, confirmed approaches), project (decisions, context), reference (external systems). Present a short bulleted list of suggested memories and let the user decide. Memory dir: ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-webgl-frontend/memory/"}'
